description_long: This object is a rustic wooden guard rail composed of four vertical posts connected by two horizontal rails. The wood has a dark, rich brown finish with visible grain patterns, giving it a natural and slightly weathered appearance. The posts are unevenly spaced and slightly angled, contributing to a handcrafted, organic look. The ends of the rail are blunt and squared off, with no additional safety or decorative treatments. There are no visible fasteners or metal components, and the structure appears to be entirely made of wood. The guard rail is designed to act as a linear barrier, suitable for use along paths, parks, or low-traffic urban areas.
description: A dark brown, wooden guard rail with four vertical posts and two horizontal rails, featuring a rustic, handcrafted appearance and blunt ends.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the thickness of the posts and rails, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_1: A frontal view displaying the full length of the guard rail, the four posts, and the two horizontal rails with visible wood grain.
description_view_2: The opposite narrow side view, similar to view 0, showing the thickness of the structure.
description_view_3: A rear view mirroring the frontal view, showing the same four posts and two rails, with the wood texture visible.
